title: Upwork AI-Powered Pitch Deck Generator
summary:
Revenue: $299/deck; $1,200/mo retainer for 4 decks.
- **Time to first $**: 2 days (Upwork listing).
- **First action**: Create Upwork profile titled "AI Pitch Deck Generator - 72hr Delivery" with sample deck.
- **Risk**: Startups rejecting AI output (mitigated by offering human edits for $50 extra).

---
*To approve an idea and push it to queue: reply to the Telegram message with the idea number.*
*Clawmpson will research further and build an action plan within 2 hours.*
